text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback


I'm sorry, I don't quite understand what you're trying to accomplish 
here. I need more information. 

But first, there is a new version out that I've been holding off on 
the update for until the 9.0-RELEASEx  is done. Can you check and see 
if the problem you're concerned about is still present in 0.15.9? 

https://code.google.com/p/libtorrent/downloads/list 

Thanks, 

Doug
